# Marta Arpa Coaching & Consultancy
> ICF certified executive coach and change consultant based in Maresme, Barcelona. 15+ years of experience in organizational transformation, executive coaching, and change management.

## About
- [About Marta Arpa](https://martaarpa.com/about/)

## Services
- [Executive Coaching](https://martaarpa.com/)
- [Team Coaching](https://martaarpa.com/)
- [Focus Workshops (Píldoras de Foco)](https://martaarpa.com/)
- [Change Consulting](https://martaarpa.com/)
- [Positive Leadership](https://martaarpa.com/)
- [Career Planning](https://martaarpa.com/)

## Blog
- [Positive Leadership: a way of leading that transforms people and organizations](https://martaarpa.com/blog/liderazgo-positivo/)
- [Impostor Syndrome: when you doubt yourself even when you are doing well](https://martaarpa.com/blog/sindrome-de-la-impostora/)
- [Transforming is not changing place](https://martaarpa.com/blog/transformar-no-es-cambiar-de-lugar/)

## Contact

## Languages
This site is available in Spanish (default), English (/en/), French (/fr/), and Catalan (/ca/).
The Spanish version is the primary and most complete language version.
